title: Luffy on Amazon Lily: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Everyone! Be quiet!! He's saying something!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What kind of trick was that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Can stretch their arms!! That's surprising!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Um, before you get dressed... that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You guys are weird... These are balls!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So I made these the same shape.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How atrocious!! so that's your true face!!!
